question: Are the fries gluten-free?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Yes, our regular fries are gluten-free—they're made from just potato and salt. Anything else you'd like today?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Okay, the regular fries are gluten-free—no cereal, just potato and salt.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it—just potato and salt, no cereal. Anything else you'd like today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it—just the fries. Anything else today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it—just the fries. Your order is ready!
